reason: Verify implemented routes, query parameters, DTO casing, envelopes, pagination, auth, and error behavior match the active gateway contract.
Verify QA service behavior and boundaries match the service contract notes.
Verify the migration and repository model align with the QA conversation schema and ownership boundaries.
Check RESTful route shape, OpenAPI coverage, gateway context propagation, and response envelope consistency.
Check migration structure, soft-delete fields, indexes, and repository isolation assumptions.
Check standard error code/status mapping and requestId propagation.
Check tests, formatting, build, and service-local quality expectations.
Check logs use structured metadata and do not leak request body or user content.
Check API fields, service models, and database columns stay consistent across layers.
